creator: lantw44@gmail.com
text:
'llvm-config37 --libfiles' command shows a lot of .a files, but none of them exist, which causes build failure for WebKitGTK+ 2.11.2.

gmake[2]: *** No rule to make target '/usr/local/llvm37/lib/libLLVMSupport.a', needed by 'DerivedSources/JavaScriptCore/WebKitLLVMLibraryToken.h'.  Stop.
CMakeFiles/Makefile2:485: recipe for target 'Source/JavaScriptCore/CMakeFiles/llvmForJSC.dir/all' failed

Can we get these .a files in llvm37 package?
